mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO video_comment (task_id, bvid, comment_id, username, gender, content, normalized_content, text_type, like_count, reply_count, publish_time, sentiment_score, sentiment_label, sentiment_confidence, sentiment_intensity, sentiment_source, sentiment_version, emotion_tags_json, aspect, aspect_details_json) VALUES
(#{comment.taskId}, #{comment.bvid}, #{comment.commentId}, #{comment.username}, #{comment.gender}, #{comment.content}, #{comment.normalizedContent}, #{comment.textType}, #{comment.likeCount}, #{comment.replyCount}, #{comment.publishTime}, #{comment.sentimentScore}, #{comment.sentimentLabel}, #{comment.sentimentConfidence}, #{comment.sentimentIntensity}, #{comment.sentimentSource}, #{comment.sentimentVersion}, #{comment.emotionTagsJson}, #{comment.aspect}, #{comment.aspectDetailsJson})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE like_count = VALUES(like_count), reply_count = VALUES(reply_count), normalized_content = VALUES(normalized_content), sentiment_score = VALUES(sentiment_score), sentiment_label = VALUES(sentiment_label), sentiment_confidence = VALUES(sentiment_confidence), sentiment_intensity = VALUES(sentiment_intensity), sentiment_source = VALUES(sentiment_source), sentiment_version = VALUES(sentiment_version), emotion_tags_json = VALUES(emotion_tags_json), aspect = VALUES(aspect), aspect_details_json = VALUES(aspect_details_json)
mapper.select: SELECT comment_id AS commentId, task_id AS taskId, bvid, username, gender, content, normalized_content AS normalizedContent, text_type AS textType, like_count AS likeCount, reply_count AS replyCount, publish_time AS publishTime, sentiment_score AS sentimentScore, sentiment_label AS sentimentLabel, sentiment_confidence AS sentimentConfidence, sentiment_intensity AS sentimentIntensity, sentiment_source AS sentimentSource, sentiment_version AS sentimentVersion, emotion_tags_json AS emotionTagsJson, aspect, aspect_details_json AS aspectDetailsJson FROM video_comment WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY like_count DESC
mapper.sql: SELECT comment_id AS commentId, task_id AS taskId, bvid, username, gender, content, normalized_content AS normalizedContent, text_type AS textType, like_count AS likeCount, reply_count AS replyCount, publish_time AS publishTime, sentiment_score AS sentimentScore, sentiment_label AS sentimentLabel, sentiment_confidence AS sentimentConfidence, sentiment_intensity AS sentimentIntensity, sentiment_source AS sentimentSource, sentiment_version AS sentimentVersion, emotion_tags_json AS emotionTagsJson, aspect, aspect_details_json AS aspectDetailsJson FROM video_comment
mapper.select: ORDER BY like_count DESC, comment_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT comment_id AS commentId, task_id AS taskId, bvid, username, gender, content, normalized_content AS normalizedContent, text_type AS textType, like_count AS likeCount, reply_count AS replyCount, publish_time AS publishTime, sentiment_score AS sentimentScore, sentiment_label AS sentimentLabel, sentiment_confidence AS sentimentConfidence, sentiment_intensity AS sentimentIntensity, sentiment_source AS sentimentSource, sentiment_version AS sentimentVersion, emotion_tags_json AS emotionTagsJson, aspect, aspect_details_json AS aspectDetailsJson FROM video_comment WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND sentiment_label = #{sentimentLabel} ORDER BY like_count DESC

SELECT comment_id AS commentId, task_id AS taskId, bvid, username, gender, content, normalized_content AS normalizedContent, text_type AS textType, like_count AS likeCount, reply_count AS replyCount, publish_time AS publishTime, sentiment_score AS sentimentScore, sentiment_label AS sentimentLabel, sentiment_confidence AS sentimentConfidence, sentiment_intensity AS sentimentIntensity, sentiment_source AS sentimentSource, sentiment_version AS sentimentVersion, emotion_tags_json AS emotionTagsJson, aspect, aspect_details_json AS aspectDetailsJson FROM video_comment WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND ( aspect = #{aspect} OR JSON_SEARCH(aspect_details_json, 'one', #{aspect}, NULL, '$[*].aspect') IS NOT NULL ) ORDER BY like_count DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM video_comment WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM video_comment WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND sentiment_label = #{sentimentLabel}
